diagrams.title: Style preset to token compliance flow
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Intake[UI/UX intake] --> Preset[Style preset resolver]
  Story[Story and brief] --> Preset
  Routes[Route evidence] --> Preset
  Preset --> Plan[design-modernize plan]
  Preset --> DerivedDS[Derived Design System]
  DerivedDS --> Gate[DS gate]
  ChangedUI[Changed UI/style files] --> Validate[design-system validate]
  Tokens[Native DS tokens] --> Validate
  Validate --> Drift[style-token drift findings]

diagrams.title: Preset authority and style drift controls
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Preset[Preset guidance] --> Boundary[Authority boundary]
  Boundary --> Tokens[Native DS tokens]
  Boundary --> Components[Component roles]
  OneOff[One-off style literals] --> DriftGate[Style-token drift gate]
  DriftGate --> Review[needs_review]
  NotApplicable[not_applicable] --> Evidence[Rationale and evidence]

clauses.statement: UI/UX intake and design-modernize plan record selected style preset with evidence and confidence.

test_refs.anchor: UIST-S-1 UIST-S-4 UI/UX intake and modernize plan record bounded style preset selection

clauses.statement: Presets are guidance only and never override native DS, Story, Spec, Architecture, route code, or gate evidence.

test_refs.anchor: UIST-S-2 UIST-S-3 UIST-S-5 design-system validate reports style token drift from changed UI files

clauses.statement: design-system validate reports changed UI/style one-off color, typography, radius, shadow, or spacing values as style-token drift.

test_refs.anchor: UIST-S-2 UIST-S-3 UIST-S-5 design-system validate reports style token drift from changed UI files

clauses.statement: Default product archetype is operator/developer cockpit, not marketing landing page.

test_refs.anchor: UIST-S-1 UIST-S-4 UI/UX intake and modernize plan record bounded style preset selection

clauses.statement: Non-web or low-style repos can mark style preset coverage not_applicable only with explicit rationale and evidence.

test_refs.anchor: UIST-S-2 UIST-S-3 UIST-S-5 design-system validate reports style token drift from changed UI files

code_pattern.must_contain: style preset coverage is explicitly not_applicable
